programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barrie's fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs & Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals. In the first episode, Paul meets seven staffie puppies whose mother has rejected them, before he visits a 13-year-old mongrel who was found wandering the streets of North London. Elsewhere, Paul lends a hand building a ladder and a platform for nine-year-old Archie(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as EastEnders star Charlie Brooks, paralympian Richard Whitehead, comedian Shappi Khorsandi and presenter David Dickinson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out

But they must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval(n)

programme.title: The X Factor: Celebrity

With Simon Cowell mentoring the Groups, Louis Walsh coaching the Unders and Nicole Scherzinger in charge of the Overs, the celebrity hopefuls will be leaving their comfort zones at the door as they battle it out to ultimately win a record deal(n)

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show

programme.title: Lethal Weapon

Meanwhile, Trish sets about preparing her campaign for district attorney, knowing she must face elements of her past before they work their way into the media spotlight. Cole also confronts matters of previous days when he experiences flashbacks as a result of an injury. Damon Wayans, Seann William Scott and Keesha Sharp star(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Wales v South Africa (Kick-off 9.00am). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the concluding last-four match, which comes from International Stadium Yokohama, as Warren Gatland's men take on the Springboks. Wales came from behind to defeat France 20-19 in a pulsating quarter-final contest seven days ago, while South Africa ended the fairytale run of hosts Japan. With analysis from Gareth Thomas, Sam Warburton and Bryan Habana, reports from Mike Phillips, Paul O'Connell and George Gregan and Jill Douglas, and commentarty by Miles Harrison, David Flatman and Shane Williams(n)

programme.title: Countrywise
programme.desc: Ben Fogle attends the annual Ennerdale Show in the Lake District, where he takes part in some sheep-showing and gets to grips with some Cumbrian wrestling, while Liz Bonnin heads to the River Nith in south-west Scotland for a training day with the river rescue team. Guest reporter Sheila Hancock returns to the quiet corner of the Dorset coast where she first fell in love with the countryside almost 80 years ago(n)

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn (2011)
programme.desc: A bumbling secret agent retires to a Tibetan monastery in disgrace after a mission goes wrong. He is lured out of seclusion by the chance to redeem himself when his former bosses seek his help in foiling an attempt to assassinate the premier of China. Spy comedy sequel, starring Rowan Atkinson, Gillian Anderson, Rosamund Pike and Dominic West(n)

programme.title: The X Factor: Celebrity
programme.desc: The star-studded version of the singing contest continues with the first of the live shows, with Vinnie Jones joining those who made it through the auditions, including Ricki Lake, Jenny Ryan, Megan McKenna and the Love Islanders. programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons hunt for a potential partner by rifling through three different homes. Yorkshire lass Cheryl takes along her best friend Danielle as she checks out a trio of homes. She has a habit of dating bad boys and is keen to break this trend. Will she find her perfect match in the lads' pad, the swish flat or the rustic farm retreat? Narrated by Rochelle Humes(n)

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2005)
programme.desc: Adolescent wizard Harry is unexpectedly chosen to represent Hogwarts School in a prestigious magical tournament, despite being legally too young to enter. Along with charming sixth-year student Cedric Diggory, Harry takes on the champions of two other magical academies visiting the school, facing deadly monsters in a series of death-defying challenges. Meanwhile, the followers of the dreaded Lord Voldemort plot to restore their master to the land of the living. Fourth instalment of the fantasy saga, starring Daniel Radcliffe, Robbie Coltrane, Ralph Fiennes, Michael Gambon, Rupert Grint, Emma Watson, Brendan Gleeson and Robert Pattinson(n)

programme.title: Prince Charles: Inside the Duchy of Cornwall
programme.desc: Observational documentary going behind the scenes of Prince Charles's private estate the Duchy of Cornwall, which he has built up over the past 50 years into a business to support himself, his immediate family and his charities. The first of two parts reveals how the Duchy is run to reflect the prince's personal philosophies, and also explores how the estate supports an ancient way of life on Bodmin Moor but also gives young families the opportunity to embark on a new start in farming(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street Icons: Audrey Roberts - 40 Fabulous Years

programme.desc: Documentary charting a year in the life of Snowdon, capturing the beauty of its four seasons and the lives of the men and women who reside or work near the highest peak in England and Wales. programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present a special edition dedicated to the stories of twins separated at birth. Mary Holmes and Elaine Allin were born just after the Second World War and raised in the same neighbourhood in Chesterfield, but forbidden from seeing each other. It wasn't until they were in their thirties that the sisters were able to find each other - and even then it only happened by chance. programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: England v New Zealand (Kick-off 9.00am). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the opening last-four match, which takes place at International Stadium Yokohama, and will see Eddie Jones' side face Steven Hansen's men. Both sides were impressive in their quarter-final matches a week ago, with England overcoming Australia 40-16 and the All Blacks dominating Ireland 46-14. Mark Pougatch presents, with analysis from Clive Woodward, Jonny Wilkinson and Sean Fitzpatrick, reports from Jill Douglas, Brian O'Driscoll and Maggie Alphonsi, and commentary by Nick Mullins, Ben Kay and Lawrence Dallaglio(n)

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barrie's fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs & Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals. In the first episode, Paul meets seven staffie puppies whose mother has rejected them, before he visits a 13-year-old mongrel who was found wandering the streets of North London. Elsewhere, Paul lends a hand building a ladder and a platform for nine-year-old Archie(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as EastEnders star Charlie Brooks, paralympian Richard Whitehead, comedian Shappi Khorsandi and presenter David Dickinson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out

Cole also confronts matters of previous days when he experiences flashbacks as a result of an injury. Damon Wayans, Seann William Scott and Keesha Sharp star(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Wales v South Africa (Kick-off 9.00am). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the concluding last-four match, which comes from International Stadium Yokohama, as Warren Gatland's men take on the Springboks. Wales came from behind to defeat France 20-19 in a pulsating quarter-final contest seven days ago, while South Africa ended the fairytale run of hosts Japan. programme.desc: Adolescent wizard Harry is unexpectedly chosen to represent Hogwarts School in a prestigious magical tournament, despite being legally too young to enter. Meanwhile, the followers of the dreaded Lord Voldemort plot to restore their master to the land of the living. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a childless farmer's wife puts Barnaby on the scent of an ancient land feud over Setwale Wood. Potions, witchcraft, marital infidelity and a ruthless campaign to save the area form the heady brew that convinces the detective he is dealing with a case of murder. Wendy Craig guest stars, with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy investigate the death of amateur artist Ruth Fairfax, whose body has been discovered by Joyce - but the more they delve into the dead woman's background, the more mysterious she becomes. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, with guest appearances by John Sessions and Leslie Phillips(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: American GIs arrive in Hastings to a mixed welcome and Foyle is called on to calm the locals. But his attempts at soothing relations are jeopardised when a barmaid's involvement with a visiting soldier results in murder, leading the detective to defy orders to keep the peace and solve the case. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell, Honeysuckle Weeks and Keith Barron(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is drowned in a bath and made to look like a bride, with a chilling lipstick message on the bathroom mirror, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders in Great Worthy. The case takes Barnaby and Jones to a donkey sanctuary, a heritage steam railway and a pub run by an ex-policeman and former brothel madam as they try to identify the killer. Guest starring Pam Ferris (Rosemary & Thyme) and Kacey Ainsworth (formerly EastEnders' Little Mo)(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse investigates the disappearance of a teacher from a secretive public school, and begins to question who he can trust when a body is discovered. Thursday wrestles with the imminent closure of Cowley Station as he tries to find the vital evidence that will connect Eddie Nero to a series of unsolved murders, and assigns Fancy to track down the man who may be the key to cracking the case(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victim's family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Leanne's past catches up with her and she is thrown into a panic when Stacey goes missing - and Stuart's attempts to help only cause domestic problems of his own. Bob has flown out to South Africa in the hope of prolonging his life, a budding romance helps to heal Denise's wounds and Jamie uses his winnings to enter the erotic-dancing business. But things begin to look bleak for the brothers when one of the women thinks she may have worked out the robbers' identities. Drama, starring Joanna Page, Matthew McNulty, Lorraine Bruce and Matthew Lewis(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Suzy gives Stan food from the canteen to take home - but it's stolen property. When Blakey discovers that Stan and Jack are biting the hand that feeds them, he vows to make trouble. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victim's family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy is forced to confront painful memories when he is subjected to a series of attacks and Walker begins to suspect a recently released prisoner may be involved. Lord Ashfordly's visiting relatives receive a cool reception and Bernie is shocked to find Rosie working at the garage, but impressed once he discovers her lucrative new venture. Starring Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Vanessa Hehir(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton and Walker investigate a security van raid in Ashfordly and are convinced there is a link to a recent robbery at a local airfield, but a senior officer visiting from Middlesbrough dismisses their claims. Vernon takes a sudden interest in the flower show when he discovers David might be the owner of a rare, potentially prize-winning fuchsia and turns to Blaketon and Ventress for help when the plant suddenly disappears(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A stately home is turned into a theme park celebrating the work of local horror writer Ellis Bell, but the opening ceremony is marred by the death of a film star. Barnaby and Troy's investigation uncovers the secrets within an eccentric family, and a centuries-old village feud comes under the spotlight. Murder mystery, written by Alan Plater and guest starring Beth Goddard(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A book dealer is found drowned, having seemingly committed suicide in despair at having sunk all his cash in a local inventor's revolutionary new transport system - but the discovery of a second body makes it clear that there is a murderer at large. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Kate Buffery and Richard Todd(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxford's last-surviving all-female college is holding a reunion to bid farewell to one of its most prominent professors. However, the evening leads to tragedy when a guest is found murdered, and Lewis is convinced the killing is connected to an attack that occurred at the same institution 10 years previously. The detective calls in his former DS, Alison McLennan, to help with the investigation, but the case takes a twist when two more bodies turn up. Crime drama, guest starring Juliet Stevenson and Saskia Reeves, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The killing of a postman, whose doorstep deliveries often included more than just letters, rocks the idyllic rural hamlet of Goodman's Land and sends Barnaby on the trail of a murderer with vengeance in mind - if Sgt Troy can keep his eyes off the attractive village policewoman long enough to follow the clues. Murder mystery, guest starring Robert Glenister, with John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Gillian Kearney(n)

programme.title: Changeling (2008)
programme.desc: A single mother in 1920s Los Angeles is distraught when her son goes missing. After months of searching, the police claim to have found him, but she insists the boy is an imposter. She resolves to prove the police are trying to bury the case, but they respond by slandering her as a hysterical and unfit mother, leading to her confinement in a mental hospital. Clint Eastwood's fact-based drama, with Angelina Jolie and John Malkovich(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel promised the chaos of her personal life was all in the past, but she is conflicted upon discovering her mother's new boyfriend is a violent domestic abuser. Meanwhile, Janet gets cold feet when she goes on her first date, terrified at the idea of having to impress a stranger. The crimebusters are united in the search for the killer of Rich Hutchings, who is found murdered in the flat he shares with his husband Adam. Barry, their outspoken and violent homophobic neighbour, is the prime suspect. However, as Adam's friend Tim struggles to recall the events of their night out, it seems Barry may be in the clear. Meanwhile, Rachel is horrified when her mum Sharon turns up asking for help. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A series of scandals makes for an interesting few days in the quiet village of St Mary Mead, and most seem to revolve around a blustering local colonel, whose brusque manner and short temper make him unpopular with his fellow villagers. When he is found dead with a bullet through the head, Miss Marple and the reluctant DI Slack investigate. Whodunit, starring Geraldine McEwan as Miss Marple, with Jane Asher, Jason Flemying, Derek Jacobi and Miriam Margolyes(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack feel guilty about an accident in the bus, so they volunteer to care for the Inspector's pets while he is on holiday. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don and Bet spend the night together, Denise accuses Don of making her life a misery, and Steve is upset to see Alison with another man(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel gets a job hostessing a party for a bathroom fittings company, Deirdre is horrified at the thought of having Craig around at Christmas. and Tanya sees Steve kissing Alison(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank's fears are confirmed by Lynn's revelation, Turner plucks up the courage to make a date, there is an unexpected candidate for a job, and a dinner party leaves Sarah envious(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel rebels over Joe's romance, there is mutiny in the Woolpack as Turner toes the line, but his foot is firmly down when Frank finally oversteps the mark(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick is called out to a remote farmhouse, where she discovers three children have been left orphaned by the death of their father. Adamant that the family should stay together, Steve helps the eldest fight a custody battle, but a series of obstacles stands in their way. Meanwhile, Vernon opens a caravan park, but it is David who ends up having to entertain the not-so-happy campers(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the depot to claim her lost property, but Stan and Jack have already eaten it. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan gets a new uniform and is proud to wear it - until he sits on a freshly painted chair. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's hopes for a night of romance are dashed when Chrissy decides to supervise his girlfriend's visit. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve does his bit for the community by taking a group of delinquents on an outdoor adventure course on the moors, but one of the lads falls and breaks his ankle, while another is wanted for stealing from a shop. Vernon sees a money-making opportunity when a religious sect arrives in Aidensfield looking for somewhere to hold a meditation convention. Rural police drama, starring James Carlton and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah's at her wits' end, while Rachel reaches the end of her tether. Frank's on the wrong side of the law, and Elizabeth might take legal matters into her own hands(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is finally on the wagon, Steve finds himself on the rails, and Michael is put on the spot when Lynn reveals all(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise appreciates Don staying with her, Denise tells Bet she feels Tanya might be making the calls, and Maureen's revelation leaves Reg stunned(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Elaine has no memory of the party, Denise confronts Hanif and accuses him of making the calls, and Deirdre has enough of feeling in the way and asks Craig to leave(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve does his bit for the community by taking a group of delinquents on an outdoor adventure course on the moors, but one of the lads falls and breaks his ankle, while another is wanted for stealing from a shop. Vernon sees a money-making opportunity when a religious sect arrives in Aidensfield looking for somewhere to hold a meditation convention. Rural police drama, starring James Carlton and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot visits a garden fete where he meets the son of an old friend and his fiancee. After having tea with the couple, the sleuth suspects that they are both in danger and Hastings' new interest in photography provides him with the clue to solve a mystery involving cyanide, failing brakes and mixed-up love lives.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A socialite is found dead next to the swimming pool of her manor house - following a series of threats against her. Barnaby and Troy are forced to dive deep into a dark world of adultery and deceit in affluent Midsomer Malham when they investigate. Mystery, starring John Nettles and Daniel Casey, with Charles Collingwood, Ann Bell and Miles Richardson(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted - they've been having a passionate, secret relationship for months. But while the volatile copper can be discreet when it comes to romance, will she be able to hide her feelings when Gill lets slip that she wasn't the first choice for the sergeant's job? Meanwhile, Janet is keen to give her own love life a boost, especially after seeing how happy Ade is with his new partner Eleanor. However, a speed-dating event might not be the best option, as Janet finds herself treating each brief encounter like a police interrogation. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Amelia Bullmore, Steve Touissant and Mina Anwar(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Unable to get used to the fact she was second choice for the sergeant's job, Rachel punishes Janet for keeping the truth from her, and although Will cheers her up with the news she has been chosen for a vice initiative, the detective is soon stung by Gill's harsh words. Meanwhile, an unconscious baby is admitted to hospital with injuries that do not match his parents' explanation of events, and when an unregistered childminder and her boyfriend enter the equation, it's unclear who had the boy's best interests at heart(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when a mystery woman arrives, claiming to be Ed's wife and seeking a reconciliation with him. However, a misunderstanding leaves her believing that Rosie is her estranged husband's new love interest. Meanwhile, a shocking link is made between some seemingly unrelated animal deaths. Jill Halfpenny (EastEnders, Waterloo Road) joins the cast(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan believes living at home is cramping his style and resolves to find his own place. Vintage comedy with Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.desc: Raquel gets a job hostessing a party for a bathroom fittings company, Deirdre is horrified at the thought of having Craig around at Christmas. and Tanya sees Steve kissing Alison(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank's fears are confirmed by Lynn's revelation, Turner plucks up the courage to make a date, there is an unexpected candidate for a job, and a dinner party leaves Sarah envious(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel rebels over Joe's romance, there is mutiny in the Woolpack as Turner toes the line, but his foot is firmly down when Frank finally oversteps the mark(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick is called out to a remote farmhouse, where she discovers three children have been left orphaned by the death of their father. Adamant that the family should stay together, Steve helps the eldest fight a custody battle, but a series of obstacles stands in their way. Meanwhile, Vernon opens a caravan park, but it is David who ends up having to entertain the not-so-happy campers(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the depot to claim her lost property, but Stan and Jack have already eaten it. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan gets a new uniform and is proud to wear it - until he sits on a freshly painted chair. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's hopes for a night of romance are dashed when Chrissy decides to supervise his girlfriend's visit. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve does his bit for the community by taking a group of delinquents on an outdoor adventure course on the moors, but one of the lads falls and breaks his ankle, while another is wanted for stealing from a shop. Vernon sees a money-making opportunity when a religious sect arrives in Aidensfield looking for somewhere to hold a meditation convention. Rural police drama, starring James Carlton and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah's at her wits' end, while Rachel reaches the end of her tether. Frank's on the wrong side of the law, and Elizabeth might take legal matters into her own hands(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is finally on the wagon, Steve finds himself on the rails, and Michael is put on the spot when Lynn reveals all(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise appreciates Don staying with her, Denise tells Bet she feels Tanya might be making the calls, and Maureen's revelation leaves Reg stunned(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Elaine has no memory of the party, Denise confronts Hanif and accuses him of making the calls, and Deirdre has enough of feeling in the way and asks Craig to leave(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve does his bit for the community by taking a group of delinquents on an outdoor adventure course on the moors, but one of the lads falls and breaks his ankle, while another is wanted for stealing from a shop. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot visits a garden fete where he meets the son of an old friend and his fiancee. After having tea with the couple, the sleuth suspects that they are both in danger and Hastings' new interest in photography provides him with the clue to solve a mystery involving cyanide, failing brakes and mixed-up love lives.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A socialite is found dead next to the swimming pool of her manor house - following a series of threats against her. Barnaby and Troy are forced to dive deep into a dark world of adultery and deceit in affluent Midsomer Malham when they investigate. Mystery, starring John Nettles and Daniel Casey, with Charles Collingwood, Ann Bell and Miles Richardson(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted - they've been having a passionate, secret relationship for months. But while the volatile copper can be discreet when it comes to romance, will she be able to hide her feelings when Gill lets slip that she wasn't the first choice for the sergeant's job? Meanwhile, Janet is keen to give her own love life a boost, especially after seeing how happy Ade is with his new partner Eleanor. However, a speed-dating event might not be the best option, as Janet finds herself treating each brief encounter like a police interrogation. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Amelia Bullmore, Steve Touissant and Mina Anwar(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An armed gang kidnaps a telephone engineer and uses his expertise to remotely trigger break-in alarms in various banks. programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage from today's race meetings at Cheltenham, Doncaster and Newbury. From Cheltenham: The 2.00 Matchbook Betting Exchange Handicap Steeplechase, 2.35 Masterson Holdings Hurdle Race, 3.10 Randox Health Handicap Steeplechase and 3.45 Pertemps Network Handicap Hurdle. From Doncaster: The 1.45 Doncaster Stakes, 3.25 Vertem Futurity Trophy Stakes and 4.00 Doncaster Handicap Stakes. Plus, two races from Newbury. programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: The secret of producing a classic Drumstick lolly at Britain's biggest family-owned sweet factory, and the making of guitars in demand from the likes of Dolly Parton and Ed Sheeran. Plus, how a roll of steel is turned into a finished radiator in a matter of minutes, and a company combining robotics and traditional artistry to create shotguns(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: England v New Zealand. Jill Douglas presents highlights of the opening semi-final, which took place at International Stadium Yokohama. With commentary by Nick Mullins, Ben Kay and Lawrence Dallaglio(n)

programme.title: Darts: European Championship Live
programme.desc: Jacqui Oatley presents coverage of day three of the event from the Lokhalle in Goettingen, Germany, featuring the concluding four second-round matches. This stage of last year's tournament saw a huge upset, as top seed Michael van Gerwen was beaten 10-7 by Steve West, while Peter Wright was another high-profile casualty. Rob Cross demolished Richard North 10-2 to reach the quarter-finals, while another Englishman, Darren Webster, narrowly avoided an upset against Spaniard Cristo Reyes, edging through 10-9. With commentary by Stuart Pyke and John Rawling, and analysis by Alan Warriner-Little and Chris Mason(n)

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his boss's empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia(n)

programme.title: Darts: European Championship Live
programme.desc: Jacqui Oatley presents further coverage of the event from the Lokhalle in Goettingen, Germany, featuring the semi-finals and final. Both of the semi-finals last year went down to the 21st and deciding leg, with Simon Whitlock beating Joe Cullen and James Wade victorious against Max Hopp, both 11-10. Wade then kept his nerve to triumph over Whitlock, 11-8 in the final. With commentary by Stuart Pyke and John Rawling, and analysis by Alan Warriner-Little and Chris Mason(n)

programme.desc: The university branch of a bank is robbed, and though Regan and the Flying Squad catch most of the gang a known killer and his sidekick remain inside holding the manager and two women hostage. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.desc: Theo tricks everyone into thinking he is corrupt in the hope that a drug kingpin will make a deal with him, and incriminate himself. But the gangster is preparing a trap of his own(n)

programme.desc: A series of accidents stops Quincy getting in to work on a typically busy morning, so Chief Coroner Hiro takes his place to examine the body of a suspected smuggler(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur persuades a reluctant Terry to make a comeback in the boxing ring to take on Jackie Wilson, the opponent he faced prior to losing his licence. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is given a deadly new rifle for testing, but the weapon is promptly stolen. Both of the semi-finals last year went down to the 21st and deciding leg, with Simon Whitlock beating Joe Cullen and James Wade victorious against Max Hopp, both 11-10. Wade then kept his nerve to triumph over Whitlock, 11-8 in the final. With commentary by Stuart Pyke and John Rawling, and analysis by Alan Warriner-Little and Chris Mason(n)

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty (2012)
programme.desc: A CIA operative joins a team of intelligence and military operatives in the aftermath of the September 11 attacks. She spends the next 10 years searching for information on the whereabouts of Osama bin Laden, ultimately leading to the final raid on the terrorist leader's hideout. Kathryn Bigelow's fact-based drama, starring Jessica Chastain and Mark Strong(n)

programme.desc: Architect George Clarke and master craftsman Will Hardie embark on a road trip to explore the ingenious small-space wonders hidden away among the snowy peaks of the Swiss, French and Italian Alps. They start out from an observation point 4,000 metres above sea level, then take in a secret ski lodge disguised as a boulder, a treehouse resembling a giant acorn and a Swiss cabin made almost entirely from concrete. programme.title: Then & Now
programme.desc: Documentary examining the history of the airport, which opened in 1946 as London Airport and has developed into one of the busiest in the world. The film also reveals how many baggage handlers have now been replaced with robots, and how the air traffic control tower has become the most advanced in the world, using cameras that can pierce fog and artificial intelligence to collate flight data(n)

programme.title: Great British Ships
programme.desc: Rob Bell investigates the history of ocean liner the SS Queen Mary, finding out how the largest ship of its day could also become the fastest - achieving speeds that few large ships can match even 80 years later. On the passenger decks, he savours the art deco craftsmanship that made the vessel the much-loved 'floating gentleman's club', where royalty rubbed shoulders with movie stars(n)

programme.title: 10 Mistakes That Sunk the Titanic
programme.desc: Documentary examining the chain of events that led to the sinking of the ship April 14, 1912, when it struck an iceberg in the north Atlantic and went down with around 1,500 passengers and crew. From the procedure for fixing rivets into the ship's bows, the delays in its construction that pushed the maiden voyage into perilous iceberg season, and the astonishing fact that the lookouts on watch that fateful night had no access to binoculars, this film reveals the 10 key mistakes that conspired to sink the supposedly unsinkable Titanic(n)

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning(n)

programme.title: Deadpool (2016)
programme.desc: A fast-talking former mercenary develops terminal cancer, and agrees to be the subject in a shady experiment in the hope of a cure. The procedure leaves him horribly disfigured, but also possessing superhuman abilities which he immediately puts to use in a quest for revenge on the man responsible for his hideous appearance. Superhero comedy adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds and Morena Baccarin(n)

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: A soldier fighting in a post-apocalyptic war against living machines is sent back in time to prevent an attempt to change the past - but when he arrives, he finds that history has been changed beyond recognition - and that a plot is being hatched by an unexpected enemy to destroy the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke(n)

programme.title: Monsters: Dark Continent (2014)
programme.desc: The Infected Zones have now spread worldwide and giant alien creatures have infested the Middle East. A US military force is deployed to destroy the monsters, as well as dealing with local insurgents. Sci-fi sequel set 10 years after the original film, starring Johnny Harris, Sam Keeley and Joe Dempsie(n)

programme.title: Step Up All In (2014)
programme.desc: A Miami street dancer faces a series of setbacks as he seeks his fortune in Hollywood. He assembles a team of dancers which prove successful in a reality TV contest broadcast from Las Vegas, but struggles to put aside old conflicts in the pursuit of his dreams. Fifth film in the dance drama series, starring Ryan Guzman and Briana Evigan(n)

programme.title: The Boxtrolls (2014)
programme.desc: The people of a small town live in fear of underground trolls, who they do not realise are actually harmless. A boy raised by the creatures must convince the townsfolk there is nothing to fear when a team of pest exterminators is hired to wipe out the friendly monsters. Stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Isaac Hempstead Wright, Elle Fanning and Ben Kingsley(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift (2012)
programme.desc: A cataclysm leaves prehistoric animals Manny, Sid and Diego lost at sea on a drifting iceberg. They try to find a way to return home, embarking on a journey that leads to an encounter with a ferocious band of piratical creatures. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary and Peter Dinklage(n)

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub(n)

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman(n)

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47 (2015)
programme.desc: The latest in a long line of genetically engineered clones bred to be the perfect assassin takes on a mission that strikes close to home. A corporation intends to use the technology that created him to build an army of superhuman killers. As the assassin fights to bring them down, he uncovers the dark secrets surrounding his origin. Action thriller, starring Rupert Friend, Hannah Ware and Zachary Quinto(n)

programme.title: Prisoners (2013)
programme.desc: Two young girls go missing in Pennsylvania over the Thanksgiving holidays, and suspicion initially falls on Alex Jones, a young man with apparent learning difficulties, who was spotted near the children's last known location. When no evidence of wrongdoing is found, Jones is freed from custody, but the distraught father of one of the missing youngsters is not convinced of Jones' innocence, and kidnaps him in the hope of extracting a confession by force. Thriller, starring Hugh Jackman, Jake Gyllenhaal and Paul Dano(n)

programme.title: Killing Ground (2016)
programme.desc: Sam and Ian decide to spend the new year camping at a national park in the Outback, and find a beautiful, secluded spot, but notice another tent is already pitched there. They check it out and realise there must have been a violent disturbance and when they later discover a frightened toddler wandering alone in the woods it is not long before they find themselves thrust into a terrifying battle for survival. Australian horror, starring Harriet Dyer and Ian Meadows(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt(n)

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis(n)

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender(n)

programme.title: The Shallows (2016)
programme.desc: A surfer strays into the hunting territory of a great white shark, and finds herself stranded on a tiny island a mere 200 yards from the shore. With the deadly aquatic predator between her and the beach and her safe haven slowly disappearing as the tide comes in, she faces a life or death struggle to get safely back to dry land. Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada(n)

programme.title: Mother! (2017)
programme.desc: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their peaceful existence. Drama, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Javier Bardem, Ed Harris and Michelle Pfeiffer(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jamie is feeling down after a serious injury to his foot following a dance rehearsal, and his mood is not helped when he finds out Harry has been advising Sam against forgiving him(n)

programme.title: Spencer, Vogue and Wedding Two
programme.desc: Documentary following Spencer Matthews and Vogue Williams as they plan their London wedding for friends and family. In the first edition, the pair put party planners through their paces, while Vogue takes mum Sandra and friend Millie Mackintosh wedding dress shopping(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party-loving Jake plans his wedding to image-conscious bride-to-be Rosie, who dreams of a more intimate affair(n)

programme.title: Garfield 2: A Tale of Two Kitties (2006)
programme.desc: The lazy moggy stows away in his owner's luggage and ends up in London. He is promptly mistaken for an English upper-class cat, who has recently inherited a grand estate, and moves into his stately home - much to the dismay of the real aristocratic feline's conniving relation, who is bent on swindling him out of his money. Family comedy, starring Breckin Meyer, Billy Connolly and Jennifer Love Hewitt, with the voices of Bill Murray and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel does her best to get the children excited about Halloween. Meanwhile, Lewis asks Joe for permission to spend one last evening with his kids before he goes to jail. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel gets a strange visit from her doctor, who drops by at Halloween to try to convince her that she was once a powerful teenage witch. At first she and Joe don't believe it, but then she accidentally turns Lennox into a cat, and Joe's Halloween robot Scary Larry comes to life. Return of the comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw refuses to drive Sheldon to a lecture so he takes matters into his own hands. Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the semi-final of the baking contest, which tests the four remaining bakers' skills with patisserie. There are only three places in next week's final, and this round of challenges will determine who does not make the cut. The signature dish requires a delicate dome and a perfect finish, while for the technical, the bakers must take croquembouche to the next level. Finally, for the showstopper, they must use all their skills to construct an edible display case(n)

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: Cornwall-based husband and wife Phil and Christine produce a five-foot long lemon and elderflower cake designed to look like a leaping fish(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: Taken 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Bryan Mills and his ex-wife Lenore are taken hostage in Istanbul by an Albanian gangster, whose son Bryan killed while bringing down a kidnapping ring. He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including This Morning, Naked Attraction, The X Factor, Bodyguard, Monkman & Seagull's Genius Guide to Britain, Panorama: Inside No 10: Deal or No Deal?, Stacey Dooley: Face to Face with Armageddon, and The Circle come under the gaze of the armchair critics, as they share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Choirmaster Jay is looking to put dark moments from his past behind him as he moves on from a homophobic attack that left him having to learn to walk again, and hopes investment banker Robbie will accept him for the person he is. Twenty-eight-year-old property manager and glamorous burlesque dancer Becky was once a shy teenager, but her raunchy dance routines have boosted her self-esteem, and her date is with Bristolian Lewis, a budding comedian who is tired of the single life, or as he puts it 'juggling with one ball'(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed ladette Lucy is on the hunt for the love of a good woman, having already met a male forensic investigator last year in the First Dates restaurant. Terry from east London, who has become comfortable living the single life, with his love for the horses and football leaving precious little time for romance, is in danger of blowing his chances with jeweller and widower Lisa when he goes into a bit too much detail about his solo interests(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including This Morning, Naked Attraction, The X Factor, Bodyguard, Monkman & Seagull's Genius Guide to Britain, Panorama: Inside No 10: Deal or No Deal?, Stacey Dooley: Face to Face with Armageddon, and The Circle come under the gaze of the armchair critics, as they share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct's staff prepare for an unusually busy night as the neighbourhood gets into the Halloween spirit, and Amy falls into a particularly foul mood when she is forced to wear a fancy-dress costume during an undercover operation. Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Elsewhere, Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On Halloween, the squad members follow precinct tradition and pull out all the stops as they compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius in the Halloween Heist. Peralta, Santiago and Holt are the determined competitors - but who will be crowned the reigning champion?(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach heads to Massa in Italy, but Brendan is not best pleased with his hungover passengers. The contestants attend a gymnastics class and take each other on at paintball(n)

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade guides a team of air cadets through the Aztec, Medieval, Industrial and Future zones of the Maze, tackling a range of skill, mystery, physical and mental challenges. Led by captain Leon, this is a unit whose members are certainly not short of confidence and they begin the night predicting big things. However, it remains to be seen if they can deliver on their boasts(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw refuses to drive Sheldon to a lecture so he takes matters into his own hands. Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he is forced to move out of his apartment to save money, leading to unexpected conflict among the gang and some unwanted observations from Leonard's mother. Christine Baranski guests(n)

programme.title: Johnny English (2003)
programme.desc: A bumbling secret agent becomes Britain's leading spy following the assassination of all the country's other espionage experts. Single-handedly he sets out to unmask a mysterious villain responsible for stealing the Crown Jewels - but no one is prepared to believe a sinister billionaire is the culprit. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson, John Malkovich, Natalie Imbruglia and Ben Miller(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Stubborn groom-to-be Sam wants a gothic wedding in the woods, but traditional bride-to-be Ezra has her heart set on a fairytale wedding(n)

programme.title: Rob Beckett's Savage Socials
programme.desc: The comedian examines social media's most topical, hilarious and outrageous content(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Having acknowledged their mutual attraction, Robin and Barney feel uncertain about how to behave toward each other and decide to date in secret. Elsewhere, Ted's first day as a lecturer at Columbia does not go to plan(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The DiMeos go on an impromptu family road trip, but Ray has something in store that angers Maya. Dylan grows anxious after visiting a fortune teller(n)

programme.desc: To get on the good side of their health insurance agent and obtain the replacement wheelchair JJ needs, the DiMeos ask Dylan to make a big sacrifice at her athletics meeting(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple prepare to celebrate their first Christmas together, but Mike struggles to find the perfect gift for Molly. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple go to the opera, but Mike fails to enjoy himself due to a cold. With her sweetheart bed-ridden, Molly decides to play nursemaid, but ends up coming into conflict with her patient's mother, who does not appear to appreciate having her role as carer usurped(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates' agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam goes to great lengths to dodge swimming classes, but his plan to avoid the sport could affect his friendship with Dave. Jealousy prompts Barry to undermine Erica when she attempts to make the world a better place by forming a school social awareness club(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray grows a moustache, it ignites a feud between his wife Beverly and his best friend Bill. Barry is convinced that he's lost Lainey's affections when Erica tells him that his girlfriend is in love with Culture Club singer Boy George. David Koechner guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Vince confesses that he never graduated from high school and asks Mike to help him pass an equivalency exam so he can attend a school reunion with Joyce(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star(n)

programme.desc: The day finally arrives that Tony gets to go home. Meanwhile, Mandy tries to find Darren, and Mercedes offers Cleo her advice(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work(n)

programme.desc: Verity's crush on Tristan grows after Miles organises a night out with everyone, while Victoria drops back in from Miami for a glass of champagne with Mark Francis(n)

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps to bring a touch of romance and sophistication to Jannine and Shaun Cartwright's neglected bedroom(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Mike Bodnar and Liz Prendergast live on a houseboat in France for most of the year, but would like somewhere warmer for the winter months. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Property experts Jasmine Harman and Sara Damergi help Nathan and Georgina Spender, who are hoping to invest some money they inherited from their parents by downsizing in Leicestershire and buying a property in Lanzarote that they can initially use for holidays, with a view to eventually making it their permanent home(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Neil Smith and his partner Steph Grzyb regularly take holidays in Fuerteventura in the Canary Islands, where Neil can play golf in guaranteed sunshine. programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit two couples who were previously featured on the show. programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples to see if they managed to find their perfect property. Later, Phil also meets back up with Steve and Jo, who searched for a family home in Cardiff in 2015(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
